## Epic 8 — Polish & Build (#93)

**Dependency:** All chapters #15-#84
**Est. Effort:** Medium

### Goal
Write chapter 21 — Glossary, a comprehensive reference of all game terms.

### Content
Alphabetical listing of every mechanical term used in the game, with concise definitions and cross-references to the relevant chapter.

### Terms to Include (partial list)
Attributes (Brawn, Fortitude, Agility, Guile, Knowledge, Reason), Critical, Fumble, Weak/Standard/Strong, Development Points (DP), Dice Types, Generic Dice, Novice/Adept/Master, Skill, Talent, Ability, Spell Chain, Always Hit, Damage Reduction, Initiative, Action Economy, Ancestry, Culture, Class, Role, Reputation, Title, etc.

### Tasks
- [ ] Extract all game terms from completed chapters
- [ ] Write concise definitions (1-2 sentences each)
- [ ] Cross-reference each term to its chapter
- [ ] Sort alphabetically
- [ ] Build and fix errors
